loc.syn: Amid countless prayers, an unexpected name is written. Two worlds, a forced promise, and the 99 Names guide their path. Can coercion turn into sincere acceptance?
Ayuna, a successful beauty vlogger, faces family crises after her sister’s death. Forced into a complex marriage, she’s torn between duty and forbidden love involving twin brothers.
This series tells the story of Aruna, a college student who is chased by gangsters after accidentally recording a murder in a train warehouse, and is then rescued by Rey, a mysterious young man.
RCTI offers a variety of programs including drama series, box office movies, sports events, talent shows, and various infotainment programs.
An Indonesian animation based on the famous soap opera on MNCTV, Si Entong, which aired in 2005.

A children's animated TV show about Upin and Ipin, five-year-old twin brothers who live with their older sister, Kak Ros, and their grandmother, lovingly called Opa, in the village of Kampung Durian Runtuh.
MNC TV's latest talent search program to find talented dangdut singers.
Tells the story of Ayat (Epy Kusnandar) who returns to his village and his son, Suparman (Damar Rizal Marzuki) who is always ready to help the community.
Tells the story of Ayat (Epy Kusnandar) who returns to his village and his son, Suparman (Damar Rizal Marzuki) who is always ready to help the community.
Spiritual inspiration for Muslims with exemplary ustadz and ustadzah.

Kiko tells of a child of a goldfish who is very independent, even though he is an only child. Kiko who is always cheerful has four good friends, namely Lola the discus fish, Ting Ting the crab, Patino the catfish and Poli the betta fish. On the other hand, the antagonists, Karkus the catfish and Pupus the eel, always make Kiko's life chaotic. One day, the lake where Kiko lives is polluted due to the reckless acts of humans, causing Kiko and friends to turn into mutants.
New Family 100 is a game show that tests the participants' teamwork and knowledge in guessing the most popular survey answers, with a total prize pool of hundreds of millions of rupiah.
Mongol chief Temujin battles against Tartar armies and for the love of the Tartar princess Bortai. Temujin becomes the emperor Genghis Khan.
An event that explores myths, strange cases, and urban legends throughout the Indonesian archipelago and attempts to verify the facts.
Sule, a housemaid, is probably the most annoying person in town. The family he works for always runs into trouble due to his mischievous behaviour.
Featuring comedy video clips.
The misadventures of a talking sea sponge who works at a fast food restaurant, attends a boating school, and lives in an underwater pineapple.
A program featured on iNews that carries a hybrid concept similar to the current situation. However, it is still packaged in the form of a bulletin reinforced with live reports and conferences.
A news program from iNews that shares the latest information, reviewed in depth from various perspectives, as well as dialogues with competent sources.
A daily news program that presents the fastest and most up-to-date information in detail from various fields.
A daily news program that airs every night, providing information on various topics ranging from politics, law, social issues, culture, economics, and sports, both domestic and international.
A television channel that broadcasts national and regional news, providing the latest and most up-to-date information on topics such as politics, law, finance, and technology.
A television channel that broadcasts national and regional news, providing the latest and most up-to-date information on topics such as politics, law, finance, and technology.
A daily news program broadcast every morning, providing information on various topics ranging from political, legal, social, cultural, economic, and sports events, both domestic and international.
iNews Sport Pagi (L) is a morning sports news program broadcast live by iNews TV, presenting the latest information about the world of sports from within Indonesia and abroad.
Special Report is a news program that presents a variety of special news that is packaged in more detail.
A talk show program that explores and discusses current issues that are not known by others thoroughly and exclusively with interesting sources.
This program raises social issues that occur in everyday life and often involves women.
The daily news program broadcast on the iNews television network replaces the Sindo news program.
A news program that focuses on information about the world of sports.
Special Report is a news program that presents a variety of special news that is packaged in more detail.
A daily news program that re-informs viewers of the latest news so they don't miss out on information.
A 24-hour satellite and cable news television station in Indonesia. This station broadcasts infotainment news programs, talk shows, and sports news.
A 24-hour satellite and cable news television station in Indonesia. This station broadcasts infotainment news programs, talk shows, and sports news.
